headline: Man Proposes With 'Will You Marry Me?' Written In Alphabet Soup, She Says 'I Thought It Was A Prank'
summary: The soup got cold during the proposal. The answer was lukewarm. She eventually said yes after he spelled it again.
fullBody: Jake Soupy proposed by spelling 'MARRY ME?' in alphabet soup. His girlfriend, Emma, thought it was 'a prank or a seizure.' 'The letters were floating apart,' Emma said. Jake respelled it. Emma said yes. The soup was cold. They have framed the bowl. Their wedding hashtag is #SoupOrLove. The caterer has been instructed to serve 'no soup at the wedding.' Jake is 'still processing.'
